## Review Request

- Review the upstream diff against the included .NET surface in [`docs/parity/manifest.md`](../../docs/parity/manifest.md).
- If the change is in scope, create or update a focused work item in [`docs/70-work/items/`](../../docs/70-work/items).
- If Copilot coding agent is available for this repository, assign this issue to Copilot so it can start the review/workflow automatically.

## Notes

- The daily upstream check workflow creates this issue automatically when new upstream commits are detected.
- The issue body should stay standardized so the review handoff is consistent.
